message.content:
@startuml
title PB-351 UC23 – View Offers Details on System Management

rectangle "Partners and Offers Platform" {
    rectangle "Next Platform" #lightblue as NextPlatformTop
    database "Next Database" #white as DB_Top
    
}


actor UI_SystemAdminManager_top <<UI>> 
note right of UI_SystemAdminManager_top :  UI (System Admin and Manager - System Management) 

box """"""" Abstract:" """#LightGray
|Abstract: | This use case will retrieve details of a specific Offer. \nThis endpoint already exists on the Partners and Offers platform,\nbut we have to add in response new fields.|
end box



' Request from top Actor
UI_SystemAdminManager_top -> NextPlatformTop : **HTTP**\nGET /offers/{offerId}\n\nNote to developers:\nAdd these fields on response:\nbenefit\nlistImageVersion\npartnerName\nAlso change type for startDate & endDate.\nTo consider timestamp now onwards.. For partner name field 'FANTASY_NAME'. In PATNER table." 


@enduml
